# the manual

everything you can do, grouped by category. lead with the baller command.


## devices
_the box itself — health, mode, services_

- **[device health](device.health.md)**
    - `curl -s http://hosaka:8421/api/v1/system/info | jq`
    - is the box ok? this answers in one shot.
- **[console / device mode](device.mode.md)**
    - `hosaka mode device`
    - one command flips the whole personality of the box.

## network
_wifi, tailscale, beacons_

- **[tailscale](network.tailscale.md)**
    - `hosaka net tailscale status`
    - the private wire that makes everything else simple.
- **[wifi](network.wifi.md)**
    - `hosaka wifi list`
    - no GUI required to get online.

## observability
_what just happened, and why_

- **[event store](obs.events.md)**
    - `/events recent`
    - every weird moment leaves a footprint here. when something breaks, this is where you look first.

## recovery
_when it's on fire_

- **[crash bundle](obs.crash.md)** *[beta]*
    - `python scripts/build_crash_bundle.py --reason 'manual'`
    - one command turns a red flag into something copilot can read.

## workflow
_things you do every day_

- **[user manual](manual.md)**
    - `/what-can-i-do`
    - everything you can do, ranked by what people actually use.
